vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-542: Session compaction rotation via JSONL truncation

plan.title: PAN: New session on compaction — rotate specialist JSONL when Claude compacts
plan.author: agent:minimax-m2.7-highspeed

narratives.Problem: Specialist sessions grow unboundedly as JSONL accumulates. After compaction, the dashboard display is correct (parseFromLastCompactBoundary), but the file itself never shrinks, causing unnecessary I/O and eventual 30-day Claude deletion.
narratives.Proposal: Truncate JSONL to just the compact_boundary + isCompactSummary after each compaction. Keep same UUID (no new session), record rotation in SQLite (session_compact_offsets). Original rotation-via-seed approach is not feasible: --session-id creates blank sessions ignoring seed files, and --resume requires pre-registration in Claude's internal storage.

narrative.Action: Add session_compact_offsets table to database.ts with columns: session_id (TEXT), boundary_byte_offset (INTEGER), rotated_at (TEXT). Add upsertBoundaryRotated(sessionId, byteOffset) helper.

Add truncateToCompactBoundary(sessionFile, boundaryByteOffset) to conversation-service.ts. Scans from boundary forward to find the isCompactSummary user entry, then truncates file to keep only compact_boundary + isCompactSummary lines. Uses fs/promises (async). Handles byte-accurate truncation.

subItems.title: Truncation preserves exactly compact_boundary + isCompactSummary entries
Truncation is idempotent (re-running finds no un-rotated boundary)

items.title: Integrate rotation check into spawnEphemeralSpecialist pre-launch

narrative.Action: Before writing the launcher script in spawnEphemeralSpecialist: (1) resolve JSONL path from sessionId + cwd using encodeCwdToProjectDir; (2) call findLastCompactBoundary; (3) check session_compact_offsets SQLite for this boundary; (4) if boundary not rotated yet, call truncateToCompactBoundary and upsertBoundaryRotated; (5) proceed with existing launcher as normal.

subItems.title: spawnEphemeralSpecialist calls rotation check before writing launcher script
test-agent is excluded from rotation check
Sessions with no compact_boundary are unchanged (normal --resume)

items.title: Add unit tests for rotation and truncation logic

narrative.Action: Add tests in src/lib/cloister/__tests__/: (1) truncateToCompactBoundary preserves correct entries; (2) session_compact_offsets upsert/lookup; (3) rotation check is skipped for test-agent; (4) rotation check is skipped when no compact boundary exists.
